goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'monday' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 18:30'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'price'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on monday and should go to london liverpool street
The train should depart from cambridge and should arrive by 18:30
Make sure you get train ID and price
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west
Make sure you get postcode and entrance fee
